title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ICRA - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ICRA - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
ICRA is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About ICRA:
ICRA is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICRA!
